memoryCustomInstructions: Extract durable user preferences, project decisions, recurring constraints, team conventions, and follow-up commitments. Ignore credentials, transient tool noise, and low-value chit-chat.
workspaceMemoryCustomInstructions: Extract durable repository knowledge from documentation, specs, notes, architecture decisions, runbooks, and reference content. Prefer stable facts, conventions, requirements, workflows, and decisions. Ignore transient chatter, secrets, and code-only implementation details.
